Formatted Metro Lagoons client update email and prepared Peter's CEO opportunity question list for Friday meeting.

title: All cron jobs fixed after gateway failure
summary: All 8 cron jobs were failing after Sunday Mar 8 setup. Root cause: timeoutSeconds in wrong location, channel routing wrong for Discord/Telegram. Fixed all jobs. Confirmed crypto-signal-alert healthy. March 9 journal written to #ava-journal.
decisions: timeoutSeconds lives inside payload object, not top-level
FF&E agent jobs → Discord; Ava's own ops jobs → Telegram
